title: Liquidity Watch: Loan Demand Outpacing Deposit Growth
description: Net loans grew 11.4% year to date while shares grew 4.1%. Loan-to-share has reached 84%, the highest in five years. Correlated across Symitar, MeridianLink, and the GL, the trend draws down liquidity by late Q4 on the current trajectory. Recommended: a deposit-gathering campaign and a funding review before the September board meeting.

confidence.rationale: Loan balances from Symitar, share balances from the GL, and the 90-day origination pipeline of $312M from MeridianLink reconcile to a single governed loan-to-share ratio of 84%, validated overnight.

title: Membership Growth Strong but Concentrated
description: Membership is up 3.1% year to date to 52,488, with a growing national base of Senate alumni. Growth remains concentrated in the DMV — an opportunity signal for the national membership strategy.

confidence.rationale: Member counts reconcile between the Symitar core and CRM with no divergence; geographic concentration is drawn from address-of-record on file.

title: Data Trust Exception Caught This Morning
description: The Verafin fraud feed loaded 41 minutes late overnight. One dependent figure is flagged for reconciliation before it is cited. Nothing reached the board unvalidated — the trust layer caught what previously failed silently, and it is the governance story in a single card.

confidence.rationale: Pipeline monitoring detected the Verafin load completing 41 minutes past window; the single dependent figure was quarantined from headline numbers pending reconciliation.
